title: crataegus orientalis var. heldreichii
intro: Crataegus orientalis var. heldreichii, also known as Oriental Hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Oriental Hawthorn include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Oriental Hawthorn is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed on their own or used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
